entries.title: Aegis-Bearing
entries.description: Projects a personal warding field. Grants +5 AV while held.

entries.title: Annihilating
entries.description: Target must CON save or crumble to dust. Wielder loses 1 max HP each time this weapon is drawn.

entries.title: Autarch's
entries.description: Weapon once belonged to ancient Autarch. Of highest quality, deals triple base damage and has five times its base trade value.

entries.title: Blood-Rapturous
entries.description: When a Biological creature is killed with this weapon, the user heals for the victim's maximum HP.

entries.title: Colossal
entries.description: The weapons deals triple base damage, has triple base slot weight. Minimum STR +6 to use.

entries.title: Extra-Dimensional
entries.description: The weapon was forged in another dimension. It has the Hypergeometric and Anti-Paradoxical tags, and five times its base trade value.

entries.title: Hard Light
entries.description: The weapon is made from hard light, projected from a wrist-mounted prism. It has a slot weight of 0.

entries.title: Heat-Seeking
entries.description: No to-hit roll when targeting warm-blooded creatures.

entries.title: Indestructible
entries.description: Weapon cannot be broken or destroyed by any means, natural or supernatural.

entries.title: Lithifying
entries.description: Targets take d8 DEX damage and gain +1 AV. At 0 DEX they turn to stone.

entries.title: Nano-edged
entries.description: Weapon deals three times base damage.

entries.title: Necrotic
entries.description: Biological targets suffer d6 STR damage alongside base damage.

entries.title: Neurotoxic
entries.description: Biological targets CON save vs death.

entries.title: Polymorphic
entries.description: Weapon can swap between two forms at will. Choose an alternate base melee type or base ranged type.

entries.title: Reflecting
entries.description: Missed attacks against the wielder damage the attacker instead.

entries.title: Psionic
entries.description: Operated using psychic power. To-hit rolls made with PSY bonus, EGO bonus added to damage.

entries.title: Rocket Boosted
entries.description: Weapon contains a small rocket-pack. +d10 damage when charging into melee range. Can be used to gain altitude.

entries.title: Stim-Boosting
entries.description: Weapon boosts wielder's reaction times. Make one extra combat action per round.

entries.title: Ultra-Corrosive
entries.description: Reduces AV by -2 on a hit. Targets take d8 CON damage alongside base damage.

entries.title: Vibroactive
entries.description: The weapon or its projectiles vibrate at an atomic frequency inimical to solid-state armour. The weapon hits as though the target was unarmoured.
